Lightning Deed Protocol v0.1

Instant Bitcoin
Asset Transfers

Transfer Runes, Ordinals, and Bitmap instantly over Lightning Network. No custodial risk. Pure Bitcoin script magic.

< 1 second
Transfer Time
Non-custodial
Security
Runes, Ordinals, Bitmap
Assets

Why RuneBolt?

The first protocol to enable instant, non-custodial transfers of any Bitcoin asset.

Lightning Fast

Transfer any Bitcoin asset in milliseconds, not minutes. The deed travels at Lightning speed.

Non-Custodial

Your assets, your keys. RuneBolt never holds your Bitcoin. Smart contracts enforce everything.

Universal Assets

Runes, Ordinals, Bitmap, BRC-20 — if it's on Bitcoin, you can transfer it instantly via LDP.

How LDP Works

The Lightning Deed Protocol uses Bitcoin Script and Lightning HTLCs for atomic transfers.

01

Deed Lock

Lock your asset with a Tapscript hash-lock. Only the recipient with the preimage can claim it.

02

Lightning Transfer

Send a Lightning payment carrying the deed key. The preimage unlocks both the payment and the asset.

03

Instant Claim

Recipient reveals the preimage to claim the asset on Bitcoin. Settlement in milliseconds.

Your Assets

Manage and transfer your Bitcoin assets instantly

Connect Your Wallet

Connect your Bitcoin wallet to view your Runes, Ordinals, and Bitmap assets

RuneBolt

The first non-custodial, instant transfer protocol for all Bitcoin assets.
